arts.ttl: Chelsea's Marc Cucurella reveals he watches the same movie TWICE every day
arts.sum: Marc Cucurella has three young children, and this may have factored into the Spain and Chelsea left-back admitting to watching the same kids' film twice every day

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca's net worth, loyal wife, Chelsea manager struggles
arts.sum: Following stints across various clubs in Europe including Sevilla, where he won two UEFA Cups and a Copa del Rey, Maresca ended his 19-year playing career retiring at Hellas Verona in 2017. Following Chelsea’s bad run since the start of the year, many pundits have speculated Maresca might be running out of time.

arts.ttl: Chelsea protest truth revealed as Roman Abramovich demand and brutal Todd Boehly reality clear
arts.sum: "I know I wanted Chelsea fans to unite in making our feelings clear to [Co-owner, Behdad] Eghbali that this squad, this squad building approach, their erosion of everything that proceeded them, including the academy, their fixation on playing'style' and their constant tampering with the club's brand and matchday experience is not acceptable for us." "The sporting directors, ticket pricing, recruitment model, treatment of academy players, and long-serving staff, the mess around stadium plans and the CPO are all concerns," says Chelsea fan and content creator Daniel Childs to football.london .

arts.ttl: Arsenal 'favourites' over Chelsea for €85m WONDERKID transfer
arts.sum: Gittens has reportedly been told by Dortmund that he will be allowed to leave this summer despite having three years remaining on his contract, with the German side needing to raise funds if they do not qualify for the Champions League. Arsenal have been among the sides who have closely watched Gittens in recent weeks and, with Dortmund likely to miss out on Champions League football next season, they could be willing to part ways with their young star for around €85 million.

arts.sum: The Blues have won just two of their last 10 league games

arts.ttl: Chelsea vs Southampton – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Chelsea host struggling Southampton in the Premier League tonight as the Blues look to get their top-four pursuit back on track. Enzo Maresca’s side lost 2-1 at Aston Villa on Saturday, a result that extended their record to two wins in 10 Premier League games.
